selected_series.title: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average
selected_series.reason: Primary all-items CPI series for measuring headline consumer price inflation.

rejected_series.title: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items Less Food and Energy
rejected_series.reason: Core CPI excludes food and energy, so it is not the best primary answer for headline CPI inflation.

justification: CPIAUCSL is the headline, seasonally adjusted CPI series and directly supports the requested five-year inflation trend.
